relations.note: The adjacency check depends on the section metadata declaring the background color.

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

rules.intent: Ensure seamless modular email assembly and rendering across clients.
rules.rule_text: Each section must be a self-contained table-based block of 600px width with 32px top/bottom padding and a declared background color, stacked directly with no external margins. Section metadata must declare its background, dermatomyositis (DM) context status, footnote symbols consumed, and CTA presence.

quotes: Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

rules.intent: Prevent footnote collision and indexing errors across dynamic email modules.
rules.rule_text: Footnote symbols must be superscript and assigned in order of appearance at assembly time. When more than one referenced claim exists, sections must use placeholder tokens (e.g. {{fn1}}) instead of hard-coded symbols.

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

rules.intent: Maintain visual independence and assembly-safety of adjacent modular blocks.
rules.rule_text: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted centrally. Sections adjacent to these locked parts must not contain decorative elements (like wave graphics) that visually depend on or flow into them.

quotes: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections
Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

rules.intent: Maintain design rhythm and visual contrast by preventing dark block clamping.
rules.rule_text: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark-background sections in the final assembled email.

quotes: All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.

rules.intent: Ensure reliable rendering across restrictive email clients.
rules.rule_text: All colors must be coded as HEX values, and all sizing in px. CSS must be inline only, and bgcolor attributes must be duplicated on tables for Outlook compatibility.
